message: Replace VAST ASCII art with TENZIR block-element banner (#5905)

files.patch:
@@ -3,10 +3,10 @@
 When integrating third-party code into the Tenzir codebase, use this scaffold:
 
 ```cpp
-//    _   _____   __________
-//   | | / / _ | / __/_  __/     Visibility
-//   | |/ / __ |_\ \  / /          Across
-//   |___/_/ |_/___/ /_/       Space and Time
+//
+//  ▀▀█▀▀ █▀▀▀ █▄  █ ▀▀▀█▀ ▀█▀ █▀▀▄
+//    █   █▀▀  █ ▀▄█  ▄▀    █  █▀▀▄
+//    ▀   ▀▀▀▀ ▀   ▀ ▀▀▀▀▀ ▀▀▀ ▀  ▀
 //
 // SPDX-FileCopyrightText: (c) 2025 The Tenzir Contributors
 // SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
@@ -37,4 +37,4 @@ When integrating third-party code into the Tenzir codebase, use this scaffold:
 
 - Preserve the original license compatibility
 - Document all modifications in code comments
-- Keep adaptations minimal—prefer wrapping over modifying
+- Keep adaptations minimal-prefer wrapping over modifying

@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ include(TenzirVersion)
 project(
   Tenzir
   VERSION "${TENZIR_VERSION_MMP}"
-  DESCRIPTION "Visibility Across Space and Time"
+  DESCRIPTION "Data Pipeline Engine for Security Teams"
   HOMEPAGE_URL "https://tenzir.com"
   LANGUAGES C CXX)

@@ -1,11 +1,10 @@
-//    _   _____   __________
-//   | | / / _ | / __/_  __/     Visibility
-//   | |/ / __ |_\ \  / /          , Accessibility
-//   |___/_/ |_/___/ /_/       Sdn. Bhd. 2025
 //
-//   This file is part of Tenzir.
+//  ▀▀█▀▀ █▀▀▀ █▄  █ ▀▀▀█▀ ▀█▀ █▀▀▄
+//    █   █▀▀  █ ▀▄█  ▄▀    █  █▀▀▄
+//    ▀   ▀▀▀▀ ▀   ▀ ▀▀▀▀▀ ▀▀▀ ▀  ▀
 //
-//   Tenzir is made available under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
+// SPDX-FileCopyrightText: (c) 2025 The Tenzir Contributors
+// SPDX-License-Identifier: BSD-3-Clause
 
 #include <tenzir/argument_parser2.hpp>
 #include <tenzir/arrow_utils.hpp>
